utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The provided plan lists a named plan and a cost for health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, and additional_services. It also includes a total_budget with a monthly cost. While plan names are given, the format does not require insurer details or coverage limits—only that each coverage be present with costs. Therefore, all five items are present and include costs.

Health coverage includes LifeFirst Standard Plan (Physical Health) and LifeFirst Standard Plan (Mental Health), both present under primary_health_coverage with ratings 9 and 4 respectively. Travel coverage includes PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 3 under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance), 24/7 Travel Assistance (Add-on) which is listed under travel_enhancement_services with rating 4, and Adventure Travel Coverage (Add-on) which is listed under travel_enhancement_services with rating 10. Additional services list Comprehensive Freelancer Protection Package (Professional Liability, Cyber Security, Home Office Equipment) does not correspond to any single ground-truth item; only Home Office Protection exists explicitly with rating 7, but since the final plan names a package not present in the ground truth, it should not be mapped. Therefore, we map only the items with exact matches.
